name: example-webgl-horizontal-parallax
title: Horizontal Parallax Gallery

title_i18n.ja: 横スクロール視差ギャラリー

description: A horizontal-scroll WebGL gallery (Three.js): frames glide sideways with lerp smoothing and each image parallaxes its texture (UV shift) by its position in the viewport.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 横向滚动 WebGL 画廊（Three.js）：画框随 lerp 平滑横移，每张图按其在视口的位置做纹理视差（UV 位移）。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 橫向捲動 WebGL 畫廊（Three.js）：畫框隨 lerp 平滑橫移，每張圖按其在視口的位置做紋理視差（UV 位移）。
description_i18n.en: A horizontal-scroll WebGL gallery (Three.js): frames glide sideways with lerp smoothing and each image parallaxes its texture (UV shift) by its position in the viewport.

query.en: Build a horizontal-scroll WebGL gallery where frames glide sideways with smoothing and each image parallaxes its texture by its viewport position.
query.zh-CN: 构建横向滚动 WebGL 画廊，画框平滑横移，每图按视口位置做纹理视差。
